error.title: Sorry, something went wrong!
error.description: Please try resending the link to your phone number.

resend-success.title: Success
resend-success.description: We sent you a new code.

sms.title: Check your messages
sms.subtitle: We've sent you a link to your phone number. Please open it and follow the prompts.

sms-processing.subtitle: Link sent to phone. Please continue from there.

new-tab-requested.title: New browser window
new-tab-requested.subtitle: To continue, we need to open a new browser window. Please tap the button below.

new-tab-processing.subtitle: We opened a new browser tab on this device. Please complete your liveness check in there.

qr-register.subtitle: We've sent you a link to your phone number. Please open it and follow the prompts.

qr-code.instructions: Alternatively, you can also scan this QR code with your phone to continue.

processing.subtitle: Mobile session started. Please continue on your there.

confirm-continue-on-desktop.title: Are you sure you want to continue on desktop?
confirm-continue-on-desktop.subtitle: In case you don't have a smartphone, you can manually upload the documents we need from your computer for now and finish the rest of the validations later.
confirm-continue-on-desktop.warning: We highly recommend you to continue from your phone, if possible, since it will significantly expedite the identity verification process.
